name: Google Ads Apps Certification
description:
Demonstrate your mastery of creating Google App campaigns to deliver business impact. Certified users will show they understand the fundamentals of campaign creation and advanced optimization strategies.

By earning the Google Ads Apps Certification, Google recognizes your ability to:

Explain how App campaigns drive marketing success by enabling user discovery and engagement
Create an App campaign to meet a specific marketing goal
Elevate the performance of an App campaign with advanced strategies for campaign, creative and measurement excellence
Enhance app quality and discoverability
